title: plectranthus edulis
intro: Plectranthus edulis, also known as the wild basil or bush tomato, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its edible, purple fruit and fragrant leaves. The medicinal properties of Plectranthus edulis include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Plectranthus edulis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Plectranthus edulis can be prepared for consumption as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in cooking as a flavorful herb, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal and nutritional properties.
